title: CreatureCraft
description: Minecraft clientside modpack for Furries and Bronies including CPM, Figura, Ears and MineLP
body:
# CreatureCraft

CreatureCraft is a client-side modpack with a focus on Furries and Bronies, it includes CPM, Figura, Ears and MineLP so you can play together even if different people have their skins in different formats.

This modpack takes some inspiration from [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized), but adds a few more mods that add a nice atmosphere, as well as changing some mods for equivalents that I personally prefer.

![CPM Skin and MineLP Skin Users Play Together](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aIepFlhU/images/ce353891767b80eb71ac219de7e35695cd018a7b.png)

Another point of this modpack is to test the compatibility between these skin mods, as they mess with the same part of the game, so if you experience any problems please open one on my end so I can investigate and file bug reports in the right place.
